summary: Iteration 5 testing: email preferences, /me/pins endpoint, profile page, widget, VCNN news section. All 11 backend tests passed. All UI flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Email prefs stored as prefs.email_upvote / prefs.email_verified using MongoDB dot notation - works correctly
ProfilePage does 3 parallel API calls on mount with Promise.all - well implemented
CountdownWidget has hardcoded APP_URL constant (not env var), but acceptable for standalone widget
seed_data_creation: Registered test_iter5_user for preference testing (cleaned up test pin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 5 features pass. Backend: PUT /api/auth/me/preferences and GET /api/users/me/pins both work. Email prefs stored as prefs.email_upvote/prefs.email_verified. Frontend: /profile page fully functional with stats, toggles, save. /widget page has no navbar/ChatWidget. VCNN section has ticker, featured card, source filters, compact grid.
